title: AI Sherpa feedback Issue body — structured payload
description: The canonical shape of the structured payload embedded in every feedback Issue body. Produced by either the /ai-sherpa-feedback slash command (source=manual) or the Gate E auto-filer (source=telemetry). Serialized as a single fenced JSON code block at the top of the Issue body OR as a hidden HTML comment; consumers must accept either. See docs/superpowers/2026-05-30-program-v2.md §3.3.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump on non-backward-compatible changes only.

source.description: Which path produced this Issue. Manual = developer typed /ai-sherpa-feedback. Telemetry = Gate E Scorer Registry auto-filer.

session_ref.description: Triage-pivot contract: the link from this Issue to the Claude Code session(s) that prompted it. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED for manual; REQUIRED for telemetry. Without this, triage is hand-waving (see v2 §3.3).

session_id.description: Claude Code session ID. From $env:CLAUDE_SESSION_ID at slash-command invocation, or from the SessionEnd hook context for auto-filed Issues.

trace_url.description: Langfuse deep-link to the trace. Populated post-Gate E; empty before.

project_path.description: Relative project path with home-dir scrubbed. e.g. '<home>/firmware/sensor-board' not '/Users/jane/firmware/sensor-board'.

sample_session_paths.description: For telemetry-sourced findings citing multiple sessions. Capped at 5 to avoid Issue-body bloat.

ai_sherpa_version.description: CalVer release tag the developer is running. e.g. v2026.06.01

domain.description: Configured domain. Must be a value listed in schemas/label_taxonomy.yml under namespaces.domain.values.

complaint.description: Required when source=manual. The four-question content from the slash command.

rule_violated.description: Optional. Name of CLAUDE.md rule the developer believes was violated, if known.

finding.description: Required when source=telemetry. Produced by a Scorer in the Gate E registry.

scorer_id.description: Stable identifier of the Scorer that produced this finding. e.g. 'rule_no_malloc_in_isr'.

scorer_version.description: Version of the Scorer at finding time. Enables regression bisection per v2 §5.7.

evidence_summary.description: PII-scrubbed prose summary suitable for human review. Must NOT contain developer names, file paths outside the relative-project-path convention, or any string matching the privacy regex set in scorers/<rule>/privacy_test.json.

fingerprint.description: Deterministic dedup key. v2 §9 prescribes: scorer_id + domain + sorted top-N contributing developer hashes. Same fingerprint = same underlying pattern; auto-filer must not file twice.

labels.description: Initial labels to apply. Must include at least one source/*, one domain/*, one type/*, one severity/* per schemas/label_taxonomy.yml. status/* is set by triage workflow, not by the producer.
